title: Bare Bones X Elytra Trims
description: Add barebones support for the Elytra Trims
body:
ABOUT:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Add Bare Bones support for the mod [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims). _Enjoy_!
